name: 💫Mandy!🍭 - Brawl Stars
description:
Oh well... MANDY BOT! FINALLY, FINALLY!!!! CHEERS!

"SUGAR HIIIIIIIIGH!!!!"

I like this girl so much, you have NO idea, she's me favorite between all of the brawlers. Yes, including Spike, she's more favorite for me than Spike, the literal mascot of Brawl Stars. I just cannot get enough of that fictional character. Keep in mind, she's NOT real and I'm obsessed with her somehow. This bot also has Chester and Berry (or Barry, however you wanna call him) included. So, yeah, accurate roleplay when meeting Mandy for the first time, on the Candy Shop!

She's so cute!!! :3 <3

You're telling me she's not cute with this one? No way! No way? No way! No way? No way!

She looks like Hatsune Miku with this... Adorable! <3
creator: InkoBendyx
